ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meter_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter that generated the data */,
  "obis_reference" TEXT /* OBIS reference for the data point */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Attribute of the data point */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class ID of the data point */,
  "value_format" TEXT /* Format of the value */,
  "value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the value */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_data_attribute FOREIGN KEY ("attribute") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_data_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_data_value_unit FOREIGN KEY ("value_unit") REFERENCES data_unit ("unit_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_data_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_data_value_format FOREIGN KEY ("value_format") REFERENCES data_format ("format_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of the meter (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "equipment_identifier" TEXT /* Equipment identifier of the meter */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the meter was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the meter is installed */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the meter */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the meter */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the meter */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meters_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the location */,
  "meter_reading_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between meter readings */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's plan */,
  "billing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of billing */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "tariff_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff */,
  "rate_per_kwh" REAL /* Rate per kWh for the tariff */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., fixed, tiered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_tariffs" (
  "meter_tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter-tariff assignment */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter */,
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tariff */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tariff assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tariff assignment */,
  "tariff_validity" TEXT /* Validity of the tariff (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_tariffs_tariff_id FOREIGN KEY ("tariff_id") REFERENCES tariffs ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_tariffs_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_type_group" TEXT /* Group of the data type (e.g., energy, meter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_format" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of the data format (e.g., numeric, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_unit" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., energy, time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time period */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meter_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the location */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the location */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
